title: Competitive Positioning
shortSummary: How to find and defend a market position. Differentiation, cost leadership, niche focus — and why trying to be everything to everyone fails.
whyItMatters: If customers cannot explain why they should choose you over alternatives, you do not have positioning. You have a product.
coreConcepts: Positioning is what your product is in the mind of the customer
You can compete on differentiation, cost, or focus — but not all three
The best positioning makes competitors irrelevant rather than inferior
Positioning must be tested with customers, not decided in a meeting room
